core.title: Core
core.description: Minimal cross-repo coding baseline built on the language-agnostic TigerStyle rulebook.

coreplus.title: CorePlus
coreplus.description: Good all-rounder baseline that keeps TigerStyle minimality while adding security, contract, change-risk, and epistemic quality.

frontend.title: Frontend
frontend.description: Frontend baseline for UI-heavy repositories where interface quality and maintainability matter daily.

backend.title: Backend
backend.description: Service and API baseline emphasizing contracts, robustness, observability, and operability.

docs.title: Docs
docs.description: Documentation-heavy baseline emphasizing document structure, evidence quality, and maintainability.

security-sensitive.title: Security-Sensitive
security-sensitive.description: Higher-sensitivity baseline for repos where security, contracts, privacy, and reproducibility are daily concerns.

review.title: Review
review.description: Temporary read-only review overlay for issue finding, evidence quality, and boundary-focused analysis.

migration.title: Migration
migration.description: Temporary overlay for staged modernization and compatibility-sensitive change planning.

debug.title: Debug
debug.description: Temporary overlay for diagnosis, evidence gathering, instrumentation, and boundary-focused testing.

design.title: Design
design.description: Temporary overlay for planning, tradeoff analysis, and architecture-level option comparison.

docs-authoring.title: Docs Authoring
docs-authoring.description: Temporary overlay for documentation writing and restructuring with explicit documentation-mode discipline.

release.title: Release
release.description: Temporary overlay for rollout, compatibility verification, reproducibility, and change-risk review.
